channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 56/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 56/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 13.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Officials ‘won’t release key vetting file on Mandelson’s appointment as US ambassador’
item.description: Officials ‘won’t release key vetting file on Mandelson’s appointment as US ambassador’

item.title: BBC Politics: Sturgeon the master communicator was close to tears - but still faces more questions
item.description: Sturgeon the master communicator was close to tears - but still faces more questions

item.title: BBC Politics: Welsh Labour faces existential crisis, says former minister
item.description: Welsh Labour faces existential crisis, says former minister

item.title: BBC Politics: Sturgeon tells BBC: I'm serving a sentence for crime I didn't commit
item.description: Sturgeon tells BBC: I'm serving a sentence for crime I didn't commit

item.description: Scottish opposition leaders criticise Sturgeon interview

item.description: Wes Streeting calls for national insurance cut and North Sea drilling

item.description: Streeting suggests NI cut and North Sea drilling

item.title: LabourList: 'The filthy, the rich, the ex-Lord and the ex-PM'
